subcodes.first_line: Jamal ad-Din the Afghan was amongst the deceivers, and solely to stir up the government against Us did he lay claim unto philosophy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال الدین افغانی از مزورین بود و محض تحریک دولت بر ضد ما ادعای فیلسوفیت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and wrath of God
